SUPPLEMENTAL MEMO IN SUPPORT OF MTN FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FILED AN AMENDED ANSWER ON MARCH 17, 2014, THAT RENDERS THE INSTANT MOTION MOOT. DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE OBTAINED LEAVE OF COURT BEFORE FILING THE AMENDED ANSWER. NEVERTHELESS, THERE IS LITTLE POINT IN STRIKING THE AMENDED ANSWER BECAUSE THE COURT WOULD HAVE GRANTED THE INSTANT MOTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE AMENDED ANSWER DOES NOT NECESSARILY CONTRADICT THE ORIGINAL ANSWER AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE AMENDED ANSWER IS A SHAM PLEADING. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: JOYCE FINLEY #8620.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Wiley, 415.290.0386, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling.PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is denied. Defendant filed an amended answer on March 17, 2014, that renders the instant motion moot. Defendant should have obtained leave of court before filing the amended answer. Nevertheless, there is little point in striking the amended answer because the court would have granted the instant motion with leave to amend. The amended answer does not necessarily contradict the original answer and plaintiff fails to show that the amended answer is a sham pleading. Court to prepare order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
*After hearing, the Court signs order denying motion for judgment on the pleadings.*

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Continued To May-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is continued to May 22, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the "Affidavit in Reply" filed on March 17, 2014 to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 8, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion may be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To May-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phillip Wiley, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is continued to May 8, 2014 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Each party must deliver courtesy copies of the papers they filed to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 8, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be taken off calendar. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sara Lerschen CSR6213.
